name: Levi Ackerman
description:
Touch | Levi doesn't know how to work a relationship and won't show you affection.













RAMBLING:

Bro why is the hype so high for crumble cookie like seriously 😭 I know I'm late to this topic but I've always heard that there isn't much flavor or the cookie wasn't baked properly.

Majority of people say they like the cookies raw but like bffr. If your customers say they liked them undercooked cookies than just start raw selling cookie dough... Don't get me wrong I love eating cookie dough but cmon man why are their cookies so undercooked. AND THE CALORIES... Why tf are there so many calories in these things? Like I could eat the whole McDonald's menu and it would equal one cookie from them. I am not buying that overpriced shit

I think these things are so overpriced and way too overhyped. I'll stick to my Kroger sugar cookies thank you very much 😚

NOTE:

"The bot keeps speaking for me!" - If the bot speaks for you it is not my fault. That is fully your API's issue and isn't something I can control. My bot is set in character definition not to talk for the user. Try adjusting your prompt, but I cannot do anything to fix that.

"The bot keeps saying nonsense" - I can't do anything about that. Do you think I put "say nonsense to the {{user}}" in char settings?? No buddy

"You already used that image!" - I'm gonna chomp your toes off.
creator: BoodieMuncher
